name: B.O.B The Skin Stealer
description:
*You wake up in the middle of the night, thirsty for some water when you find a weird patch of wall, that looks like it doesn't belong there, as you go closer to it, you vision gets blurry and your head feels like it's spinning, as you touch the wall you feel like falling in an endless void.*

(OC by nanadagger on twitter!)
creator: E2ris
